overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a sci-fi aerial vehicle navigating through dense fog over mountainous terrain at night. Features a futuristic amber HUD interface and a brief red alert lighting sequence as the craft approaches a bright celestial light source.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy aerial corridor between mountain silhouettes

agents.ego_description: piloting the aircraft forward through dense fog toward a distant illuminated structure

entered.detail: futuristic amber holographic display interface with radar and system readouts
large platform or installation with blue and orange lights visible through fog
dense grey atmospheric fog obscuring visibility throughout the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view flying through dense fog. The amber holographic HUD displays flight data while the vehicle approaches a distant illuminated structure barely visible through the grey veil. Mountain silhouettes flank the flight path on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: alert zone with red atmospheric lighting

events.description: sudden intense red alert lighting floods the cockpit and external view, replacing the grey fog with crimson hue

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady flight course during the red alert lighting condition

entered.detail: intense crimson red lighting filling the entire field of view indicating an alert status

segments.scene_description: The atmospheric lighting shifts dramatically to intense crimson as a red alert activates. The fog becomes saturated with red light, obscuring the previously visible structure while the HUD remains active. The vehicle continues forward through the alert zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with bright celestial illumination

events.description: red alert fades returning to foggy conditions with bright white light source now visible ahead
vehicle begins banking and turning to the right to navigate around mountainous terrain

agents.ego_description: banking right while approaching a bright celestial light source, with pilot's hand visible on controls

entered.detail: intense white light source resembling a sun or moon shining through the fog ahead
rocky mountainous landscape with detailed ridges becoming visible on the left
gloved pilot hand visible gripping the control stick on the right side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the red alert state, the vehicle continues through fog toward a brilliant celestial light source while banking right to navigate the mountainous terrain. Rocky outcrops and ridges become visible on both sides as the pilot's hand appears on the controls, maneuvering through the valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a first-person cockpit perspective as a vehicle navigates through a dense, foggy mountain pass that transforms from a muted grey haze into a vivid red alert zone before emerging toward a brilliant light. It begins with the craft gliding through thick fog flanked by mountain silhouettes, guided by an amber holographic HUD toward a distant, dimly lit structure. As the vehicle pushes forward, the atmospheric lighting shifts dramatically to an intense crimson, saturating the fog in a red alert state that obscures the horizon. The scene then transitions back to a neutral palette as the craft exits the alert zone, banking right to maneuver through a rocky valley. Finally, the camera reveals the pilot's hand on the controls as the vehicle steers between steep ridges toward a blinding celestial light source.
